issue_summary: In the FinalizableReferenceQueue code, remove the unnecessary nested exception class Finalizer.ShutDown, which could cause problems if the URL for the classfile of Finalizer was not related in the obvious way to the URL for the classfile of Finalizer.ShutDown. This is Guava issue 1505 <https://code.google.com/p/guava-libraries/issues/detail?id=1505> reported by Jesse Glick <jglick@cloudbees.com>, and the fix is based on the patch he linked to there.
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Cleans up a single reference. Catches and logs all throwables.
   * @return true if the caller should continue, false if the associated FinalizableReferenceQueue
   * is no longer referenced.
   */
